epics.title: Symmetric ingress bounds — validate on both directions (Phase 2)
Opportunistic cleanup & dedup (Phase 4 — do not churn)

stories.title: Char-boundary-safe scrollback truncation (U-001)
Symlink-safe, depth-bounded JSONL directory walk (U-003)
Overflow-safe parsers for agent-written and markdown content (U-011, U-050)
Documented invariants & symmetric clamps in the paint path (U-036, U-046, U-047)
paneflow-process crate — run_with_timeout primitive
Bound the self-update subprocess + add update-worker watchdog (U-002, U-015)
Bound the git subprocess layer (U-035)
Bound agent enumerators, installer CLIs, and shim reapers (U-032, U-025)
session.json read-path size guard + restore-time caps (U-008, U-016)
IPC socket boundary hardening — bounded client reads, timeouts, fail-closed perms (U-029, U-027, U-028, U-031)
Schema-boundary breadth caps + legacy ratio handling (U-008, U-007)
Restore-time path-traversal re-validation (U-030, U-041)
Centralize the scattered MAX_* caps (architectural cleanup)
Fix the diff revspec sanitizer (U-006)
Symmetric OSC52 Store sanitization (U-023)
Markdown bidi/zero-width stripping in body spans (U-019)
Correct exactly-MAX final-line classification (U-017)
Self-update security re-audit + deferred platform pins
stories.notes: Focused security second-pass on update/** + self_update_flow.rs (agent-explore, PRD-accepted alternative to /ultron --focus security): VERIFIED_CLEAN — minisign fail-closed before promote on all 3 platforms (appimage/dmg-before-mount/msi-before-msiexec); macOS adds codesign --verify --strict --deep + spctl --assess before promotion, Windows adds WinVerifyTrust before msiexec. Zero new findings; coverage raised medium->high. AC2 macOS Team-ID pin LANDED (verify_macos_bundle codesign -R subject.OU=228F9H5P95, dmg.rs; cfg(macos), CI-verified). AC2 Windows publisher pin DEFERRED (blocked): Azure Trusted Signing not provisioned (signing disabled across CI matrix, 6 secrets empty, no signed MSI exists, cert auto-rotates so subject-CN pin value unknowable) — pinning now would risk bricking the Windows update path once signing goes live (PRD Technical Considerations). Documented insertion point + landing steps in msi.rs windows_verify_trust; tracked follow-up. AC3 no HIGH+ → no new P0 story appended.

stories.title: AI shim + agent_launcher + session-resume argument-injection pass
stories.notes: VERIFIED_CLEAN. resume_command (sessions_sidebar.rs:521) is the single builder interpolating an agent-derived session_id into a PTY command; it re-gates via is_valid_session_id (agent_sessions.rs:427), which rejects any value whose first char is not [A-Za-z0-9_] — so --dangerously-skip-permissions/-x/- are refused (CWE-88 closed, building on EP-007). agent_launcher emits only static binary + config-gated flags (no agent-derived positional). Added builder-layer regression test resume_command_neutralizes_flag_shaped_session_id (the predicate-level test already existed at agent_sessions.rs:653). No findings filed.

stories.title: Harden ai_hooks/extract.rs untrusted-JSONL parsing
stories.notes: Premise corrected: there is no `ai_hooks/extract.rs` file parser. crates/paneflow-ai-hook/src/main.rs is the hook PRODUCER (one-shot IPC client reading a single JSON payload from STDIN, not a JSONL file), and its only untrusted input is already bounded — MAX_STDIN_BYTES=16 MiB via the take(N+1) idiom (main.rs:445-470), oversized rejected with a diagnostic and no frame sent. The real JSONL FILE parsers (claude_sessions.rs/codex_sessions.rs) are already per-line (MAX_LINE_BYTES) + per-file (MAX_SESSION_SIZE_BYTES) bounded by EP-003. AC1 per-file/per-line cap is N/A (no file/line parse here); the equivalent stdin cap exists. AC2 satisfied: added the missing regression test oversized_stdin_is_rejected_and_drops_frame (integration.rs) asserting exit 0 + frame dropped + 'stdin exceeds' diagnostic. AC3: the 'ACP message parsing' coverage gap is DROPPED — crates/paneflow-acp is now trivial (protocol parser deleted with the in-app chat); the ai-hook stdin path is the real untrusted-parse surface and it is bounded.

stories.title: MCP-install config-file RMW/TOCTOU pass (U-009, U-010)
stories.notes: AC1 TOCTOU: the RMW contract is SOUND — io.rs does backup (copy->.bak, abort on failure) then atomic temp+rename (NamedTempFile::new_in same dir + sync_all + persist). The read->rename window is a same-UID, last-writer-wins race (no flock), benign for a user-scoped installer and recoverable via .bak; no code change (documented). AC2 absent-vs-malformed: FIXED — claude_code.rs:124 and codex.rs:105 used the tolerant current_*_command (.ok()? swallows parse errors) so a present-but-malformed config wrongly returned NothingToRemove; added a read_*_or_default probe on a present file so corruption surfaces a loud Err (gemini/opencode were already correct via support::json_uninstall). Tests uninstall_malformed_config_is_error + uninstall_absent_config_is_nothing_to_remove (both writers). AC3 resolve_target (tools.rs:168): FIXED — added an as_f64 branch so an integral float 42.0 resolves directly to surface_id 42 (honoring the number-typed schema) while 42.5/negative/out-of-range error. Tests read_pane_integral_float_target_is_treated_as_id + read_pane_fractional_target_is_error.

stories.title: Telemetry PII-absence guard test
stories.notes: VERIFY-NOT-FIX confirmed: every string-valued telemetry property is a platform const (std::env::consts), a compile-time/release-feed version, a canonical &'static str tag (install_method_tag/error_category_tag), or a closed enum (UpdateCheckTrigger::Auto, UpdateDismissReason); session_corrupted.error_category is a &'static str bucket and backup_path is deliberately replaced by a bool. distinct_id is an anonymous UUID v4. Added guard tests in telemetry_events.rs: telemetry_property_surface_carries_no_pii (assert_pii_safe walker — rejects path separators, user@host, whitespace, >64-byte values, and the running $HOME) applied to the pure prop-builders + reconstructed app_started/update_installed bags; distinct_id_is_a_uuid_v4_unrelated_to_identity (v4 nibble check). No scrubber needed — PII excluded by construction.

stories.title: Perf hot-path batch (U-024, U-033, U-021, U-034, U-052)
stories.notes: DONE: U-052 — reported_ports Vec<u16> → HashSet<u16> (pty_session.rs:281/682/1007), O(1) membership + flat bounded cost (NFR 'reported_ports bounded'); golden+existing tests pass. DEFERRED (do-not-churn, recorded per DoD): U-033 — ALREADY OPTIMAL, cursor blink is decoupled from relayout via the shared BlinkPhase entity (US-006 of the prior PRD); blink toggles `visible`+notify with NO layout_from_snapshot call, so nothing to change and the headline Success-Metric ('0 contrast recompute on unchanged cells at blink') is already met. U-024 (APCA memo) & U-034 (merge_background_regions per-frame sort) — render-path, MED risk: the golden_frame net catches a fixed-theme contrast/merge regression but does NOT cover the memo's theme-generation invalidation nor rect-ordering assumptions; no demonstrated bug; deferred to land alongside adjacent render work (PRD EP-006 'do them only alongside adjacent work'). U-021 (scan_output) — AC premise does not hold in current code: scan_output does NOT lowercase the whole joined blob (lowercasing lives inside detect_framework); the only residual is a per-sweep join(" ") alloc — marginal LOW payoff, deferred. Golden parity confirmed for the done item.

stories.title: Dedup / over-generality batch (U-004, U-005, U-013, U-039, U-040, U-042)
stories.notes: DONE: U-013 — workspace_idx_for_terminal uses the zero-alloc any_leaf (event_handlers.rs:784) instead of collect_leaves().iter().any() (which cloned a Vec<Entity<Pane>>); behavior-preserving, covered by existing layout/workspace tests. DEFERRED (do-not-churn, recorded per DoD + 'skip riskier-than-payoff' AC): U-040 (9× Ctrl+1-9 → one indexed action) — CHURN TRAP: each maps to a distinct zero-sized action wired in keybindings/registry + 9 on_action handlers; collapsing rewrites action-dispatch + keybinding registration for ZERO behavior gain (the 9 thunks are already one-liners) at cap risk. U-042 (DiffScope serde) — persisted-format behavior risk: manual from_persisted is lenient (Option) while serde errors hard; the round-trip is a stored session format and is unit-tested, so swapping the path can break old session files — not clearly behavior-preserving. U-005 (TerminalView reads paneflow.json 4×→1×) — LOW payoff (config reads at pane spawn, not a hot path) and requires hoisting bindings before a large struct literal; deferred to limit churn. U-004 (3× detect_*_at_hover share a helper) & U-039 (4 drop-split handlers share a resolve+cap prologue) — bounded maintenance refactors, no demonstrated bug, each needs a new parity test; deferred to land alongside adjacent work.

stories.title: Minor correctness / robustness batch (U-012, U-014, U-018, U-020, U-022, U-026, U-053)
stories.notes: ALL 7 ADDRESSED (the highest-value batch — real correctness fixes). U-012 (filter.rs match_positions): builds a lowered→original byte-offset map and binary-searches it, so non-ASCII highlight ranges (İ→i̇, ß→ss change byte length) slice the ORIGINAL string correctly instead of drifting to 'no highlight'; +non-ASCII unit test. U-014 (ipc_handler.rs): upsert_session_state now RETURNS the resolved session key and the ai.stop 5s auto-clear keys on it — a legacy no-pid frame is stored under a synthetic/fallback key but the old code captured raw `pid` (None) and the `let Some(pid_key)` guard short-circuited, so that Finished session never cleared and leaked into the sidebar. U-018 (main.rs watch_git_dir): the git-watch refcount is committed only AFTER watch() succeeds — the old form incremented to 1 before checking, so a transient failure pinned count==1 and every later workspace sharing the repo never retried. U-020 (markdown/view.rs): render_node threads the sibling index into render_code_block, which hashes (idx, text) so two identical code blocks get distinct ElementIds (no coupled scroll state); golden parity confirmed. U-022 (terminal/shell.rs): an rc-file write failure now aborts shell-integration activation (return vec![]) for zsh/bash/fish/pwsh instead of handing the shell an --rcfile/source path that doesn't exist (zsh bails before hijacking ZDOTDIR). U-026 (pty_session.rs): cwd falls back to dirs::home_dir() with a logged warning on current_dir() failure, not `/`. U-053 (ipc.rs): IpcRequest gains a `cancelled: Arc<AtomicBool>` set when the 5s dispatch timeout fires; process_ipc_requests skips a cancelled request so a slow non-idempotent mutation (workspace.create/surface.split) can't run after the client gave up and retried (duplicate workspaces/panes); the wait+cancel logic is extracted to `await_or_cancel` with 2 unit tests. Tests: U-012 + U-053 have unit tests; U-014/018/020/022/026 are GPUI/fs/spawn-coupled (manual-verification) + golden/test parity (846 src-app tests green). REVIEW FOLLOW-UP (CONSIDER, deferred per do-not-churn): the U-022 git-watch refcount under-counts by 1 in the transient-watch-failure path — if workspace A's watch() fails (no increment) then B's succeeds (count=1), A's close decrements 1→0 and unwatches the dir while B still needs it (premature unwatch, cosmetic git-badge staleness). Net improvement over the old never-watched bug; clean fix needs a separate `watched` HashSet decoupled from the refcount — exceeds the minor-correctness risk budget, recorded not fixed.

deferred_findings.rationale: INFO/SUBJECTIVE findings whose own remediation marks them optional / no-functional-change / defer. Tracked here as Non-Goals, not stories. Revisit if a related feature lands.
